title: Bridge Essay: Intrinsic timescales and predictive allostatic interoception in brain health and

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**Intrinsic timescales and predictive allostatic interoception in brain health and disease.**. Neurosci Biobehav Rev.. PMID: 38104789. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2023.105510. The cognitive neuroscience of brain diseases faces challenges in understanding the complex relationship between brain structure and function, the heterogeneity of brain phenotypes, and the lack of dimensional and transnosological explanations. This perspective offers aframework combining the predictive coding theory of allostatic interoceptive overload (PAIO) and the intrinsic neural timescales (INT) theory to provide amore dynamic understanding of brain health in psychiatry and neurology. PAI
